_README: Claude Code Memory Cache hooks + a minimal permission set. Replace <MEMORY_CACHE_PATH> with the absolute path where you cloned this repo, and make sure `python`, `graphify`, and `code-review-graph` are on your PATH. MERGE this into your existing ~/.claude/settings.json — do not blindly overwrite. On Windows you may need to swap `2>/dev/null` for `2>NUL` in the hook commands.

hooks.command: python -c "from graphify.watch import _rebuild_code; from pathlib import Path; _rebuild_code(Path('.'))"

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"A code graph exists — read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md before searching raw files."}}' || true
